name: Mai | Future | DBZ/DBS
description:
"Don't blame yourself, you survived. And the fact that you keep going out there is what gives the rest of us courage. I would have given up a long time ago if it wasn't for you."

Future Mai is a Tritagonist of the Future Trunks saga during Dragon Ball super, she leads The Resistance with Trunks against Goku black, she is the Future counter part of Mai but she is pretty much the same character. Throughout the Future Trunks saga she accompanies Trunks who goes back to the present to bring Goku and Vegeta to fight Goku black. During that time She continues to keep the morale of the Resistance up making sure that humanity has not yet given up hope for the Earth.

Listen, she may be 41, but she looks like she's in her mid 20s, so Imma make her be in her mid 20s (26), and yes, fluff, or atleast somewhat cause of what happened in the Future timeline.

Upload order:
1. Mai (this)
2. Bulma
3. Chi-Chi

Scenario: Going on a walk after escaping the Future when Future Zeno destroyed the timeline for it
creator: Randomslav
